title: Color Change/Email Notifcation for Time tracking acros boards, in a dashboard
excerpt: We have 15 boards with time tracking integrated, and all 15 boards are linked to a master dashboard. The time tracking widget in the dashboard displays all time tracked per board, with a sum of all hours tracked across b…

posts.author: KateBurrows (Kate Burrows)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have 15 boards with time tracking integrated, and all 15 boards are linked to a master dashboard. The time tracking widget in the dashboard displays all time tracked per board, with a sum of all hours tracked across boards for each week. (I also have a couple of time tracking widgets that track time by year).

I’d like to be able to send a notification, or have a color change, or some other kind of note when the total amount of work hours across boards has exceeded a certain limit. For example, if I set my weekly work week to 50 hours, across all boards, in the dashboard once I hit the 50 hour mark, I will receive a notification or see a color change.

I know I can set this up as an automation in each board, but I don’t want to set limits per board- I want an overall weekly limit.

Is this possible?
